rule: Use sticky navigation so users always have a way out
do_code: position: sticky; top: 0; backdrop-filter: blur(12px); z-index: 50;
dont_pattern: Fixed nav that scrolls away leaving users stranded

rule: Highlight the active page in the nav
do_pattern: Active link with distinct color or underline
do_code: nav a.active { color: var(--accent); border-bottom: 2px solid currentColor; }
dont_pattern: All nav links look identical with no active state
Apply animations to all users regardless of accessibility needs

rule: Keep transitions under 300ms for interactive elements
dont_pattern: Slow transitions that make UI feel sluggish

rule: Always use visible labels — never placeholder-only
do_pattern: Label above or beside input persists while typing
dont_pattern: Placeholder as the only label (disappears on focus)

rule: Show inline validation immediately after field blur
do_pattern: Inline error message below the field in red
do_code: Please enter a valid email
dont_pattern: Showing all errors only after full form submit

rule: Maintain WCAG AA contrast ratio minimum 4.5:1 for body text
dont_pattern: Low contrast grey on grey fails readability

rule: All interactive elements must be keyboard focusable
do_pattern: Visible focus ring on all buttons and links
dont_pattern: Removing default focus styles without replacement

rule: Lazy load images below the fold
dont_pattern: Eager loading all images including off-screen ones
Serving unoptimized PNGs and JPEGs at full resolution

rule: Set a comfortable line length for body text
dont_pattern: Full-width text lines that exhaust readers' eyes

do_pattern: Consistent scale ratio between heading levels
dont_pattern: Arbitrary random font sizes with no system

do_pattern: CSS smooth scroll on the root
dont_pattern: Jarring instant jump to anchor sections

rule: Add scroll padding for sticky nav offset
do_pattern: Offset scroll targets by nav height
dont_pattern: Anchor targets hidden behind fixed navigation

rule: Use only one primary CTA per view
do_pattern: Single high-contrast button as primary action
dont_pattern: Multiple equally weighted CTA buttons competing

rule: Primary CTA must have strong contrast against its background
do_pattern: CTA button passes 4.5:1 contrast against page background
dont_pattern: CTA blends into the background and goes unnoticed
